# Carina Documentation — full index

## Carina

Local-first AI agent runtime with policy, hash-chained audit, and transactional rollback.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/index.md

## Agents overview

ReAct coding agent loop — model decides, kernel authorizes, Zig executes.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/agents/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/agents/overview/index.md

## Sub-agents

Delegate work with SubagentSpawn and capability attenuation.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/agents/sub-agents/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/agents/sub-agents/index.md

## JSON-RPC reference

Curated method reference for the local JSON-RPC control plane.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/json-rpc/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/json-rpc/index.md

## Method catalog

Protocol-driven JSON-RPC method catalog synced from protocol/jsonrpc/methods.json.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/methods/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/methods/index.md

## Runtime API overview

JSON-RPC over unix socket/stdio, optional Gateway, scopes, and SDK surfaces.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/overview/index.md

## Sessions

Create, control, stream, and export Carina sessions.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/sessions/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/sessions/index.md

## API versions

How Carina docs version channels map to protocol catalogs and release lines.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/versions/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/api/versions/index.md

## Audit & rollback

Append-only event log, hash-chain verification, and transactional patch recovery.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/concepts/audit/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/concepts/audit/index.md

## Policy & capabilities

Capability types, permission profiles, command risk levels, and default security posture.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/concepts/policy/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/concepts/policy/index.md

## Runtime model

Layered architecture — client surfaces, Go control plane, Rust capability kernel, Zig tools.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/concepts/runtime/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/concepts/runtime/index.md

## FAQ

Product boundaries, security, offline use, and docs site tokens.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/deployment/faq/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/deployment/faq/index.md

## Local install

Run the daemon, CLI, and native tools on a developer machine.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/deployment/local/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/deployment/local/index.md

## Workers

Lease-based remote workers, production profile, drain, and containers.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/deployment/workers/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/deployment/workers/index.md

## Installation

Install the Carina CLI and daemon on macOS, Linux, or via package managers.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/getting-started/installation/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/getting-started/installation/index.md

## Introduction

What Carina is, who it is for, and how the runtime is structured.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/getting-started/introduction/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/getting-started/introduction/index.md

## Quickstart

Start the daemon, run an agent task, inspect audit, and roll back a patch.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/getting-started/quickstart/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/getting-started/quickstart/index.md

## Memory overview

Governed local memory, MemoryWrite capability, and optional HMS projection.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/memory/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/memory/overview/index.md

## Traces & audit

Event log, item stream, cost attribution, and hash-chain verification.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/observability/traces/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/observability/traces/index.md

## MCP integrations

Governed MCP client/server without leaking unconstrained authority.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/tools/mcp/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/tools/mcp/index.md

## Tools overview

Built-in agent tools, Zig toolchain, and capability mediation.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/tools/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/tools/overview/index.md

## Workflows overview

Declarative multi-step agent DAGs with attenuated subagents.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/workflows/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/workflows/overview/index.md

## Tutorial: review pipeline

Run the in-repo review workflow with parallel reviewers and a synthesis step.

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/workflows/tutorial-review/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/workflows/tutorial-review/index.md

## Carina

本地优先的 AI Agent 运行时：策略门控、哈希链审计、可事务回滚。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/index.md

## Agents 概览

ReAct 编程 Agent — 模型决策、内核授权、Zig 执行。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/agents/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/agents/overview/index.md

## 子 Agent

以衰减后的能力委派工作。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/agents/sub-agents/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/agents/sub-agents/index.md

## JSON-RPC 参考

本地 JSON-RPC 控制平面方法参考。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/json-rpc/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/json-rpc/index.md

## 方法目录

由 protocol/jsonrpc/methods.json 同步的 JSON-RPC 方法目录。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/methods/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/methods/index.md

## Runtime API 概览

JSON-RPC、可选 Gateway、作用域与 SDK 表面。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/overview/index.md

## 会话

创建、控制、流式读取与导出 Carina 会话。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/sessions/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/sessions/index.md

文档 0.6.x / next 通道与协议目录的对应关系。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/versions/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/api/versions/index.md

## 审计与回滚

追加写事件日志、哈希链校验与事务补丁恢复。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/concepts/audit/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/concepts/audit/index.md

## 策略与能力

能力类型、权限配置、命令风险等级与默认安全姿态。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/concepts/policy/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/concepts/policy/index.md

## 运行时模型

分层架构 — 客户端、Go 控制面、Rust 能力内核、Zig 工具链。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/concepts/runtime/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/concepts/runtime/index.md

关于部署、安全与产品边界的常见问题。

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/deployment/faq/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/deployment/faq/index.md

- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/tools/overview/index.md

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/workflows/overview/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/workflows/overview/index.md

## 教程：审查流水线

- URL: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/workflows/tutorial-review/
- Markdown: https://carina.nebutra.com/zh-cn/workflows/tutorial-review/index.md
